name: Mac OS vs. Linux: Who's #2?
description: The Mac Observer analytical piece reconciling competing claims about #2 desktop OS share between Mac OS X and Linux. Authors aggregate data from HP, IDC, Wired, Gartner, Google browser logs, and analyst commentary — including Peter Kastner's ~3% Mac share estimate (originally to Wired) as a secondary-source quote. Concludes that definitions matter: Linux installed seats (including piracy, embedded, preloaded non-Windows PCs) and active Mac desktop users are measured inconsistently.

creator.name: Bryan Chaffin and Vern Seward (The Mac Observer); Peter Kastner (secondary-source quote)
